channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] UKRAINE → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Belgorod, Belgorodskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: UKRAINE / nan. Location: Belgorod, Belgorodskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] DEMONSTRATOR → MOLOTOV : Demonstrate or rally (Boulder, Colorado, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: DEMONSTRATOR / MOLOTOV. Location: Boulder, Colorado, United States. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] MIGRANT → nan : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: MIGRANT / nan. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Employ aerial weapons. Actors: ISRAEL / LEBANON. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.
